title: TaxAddress

city.description: The city name that can be used by sellers for tax purpose.

countryCode.description: The country code that can be used by sellers for tax purpose, represented as a two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. For example, US represents the United States, and DE represents Germany. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

postalCode.description: The postal code that can be used by sellers for tax purpose. Usually referred to as Zip codes in the US.

stateOrProvince.description: The state name that can be used by sellers for tax purpose.

description: This container consists of address information that can be used by sellers for tax purpose.
